filesCreated.purpose: Editor component with RichText headline/description, ThemeButton tertiary, shouldDisplay(), renameBlock()
Frontend PHP template mirroring TSX structure exactly
Block icon (24x24, content-level, no container border — heading + description lines + tertiary button)
Adjacent sibling selector for consecutive block border separator (auto-included via webpack glob)

warnings: asset size limit warnings — pre-existing, not from this block

lint.note: All lint errors are in pre-existing blocks (DemoContainer, EventHero, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs). Zero errors in LinkWithDetails files.

implementationNotes: Block uses div wrapper (not section) — it is an inner block for use inside Tabs panels, no section/container needed

Consecutive block separator implemented via CSS adjacent sibling selector .wp-block-takt-link-with-details + .wp-block-takt-link-with-details in LinkWithDetails.css, auto-bundled by webpack glob blocks/**/*.css
shouldDisplay() pattern used for optional description field — hidden in PHP when empty
renameBlock() syncs list view name from headline content
aria-labelledby suppressed via false in theme_block_props — block uses inline h3, not a heading attribute
ThemeButton always tertiary with allowVariationChange=false per spec DEC-005
